title: Arrow Out
mechanic: tap-away directional clear (Tap Away / Unpuzzle): tap a car and it drives off the lot in the way it faces, only if its lane to the edge is clear; clear every car to win
non_timer_pressure: 3-star rating by move count + coin-cost undo/hint budget
retention: level map progression, daily seeded puzzle, coin economy, unlockable car-set skins (garage)
